prestazioni: Replace the stock 3.5L Rover V8 (engine code: Buick-derived 3528cc, later known as Rover V8) with a fully built **Rover V8 4.6L stroker kit** (e.g., **RPI Engineering 4.6L forged crank, Mahle forged pistons, and Crower billet connecting rods**) paired with a **Harrop TVS2300 supercharger** (10psi boost) and a **Holley HP EFI system** (standalone ECU) for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Compression ratio: 9.5:1, estimated power: 450hp at the crank.

Install a **Tremec T56 Magnum 6-speed manual transmission** (with **McLeod twin-disc clutch**) and a **Quaife ATB differential** (3.73:1 final drive) to handle the increased torque. Pair with a **Tilton hydraulic throwout bearing** for smoother engagement under high load.

Upgrade the braking system with **AP Racing CP8370 front 4-piston calipers** (330mm two-piece rotors) and **Wilwood Dynalite rear calipers** (280mm rotors), paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**. Suspension overhaul includes **Bilstein B16 coilovers** (adjustable damping) with **Polybush polyurethane bushings** and **SuperPro anti-roll bars** (24mm front, 18mm rear) for reduced body roll.

Replace the stock exhaust with a **Jet-Hot-coated stainless steel 3-inch system** featuring **MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers** (straight-through design) and **Schoenfeld 1.75-inch primary headers** (equal-length, 4-into-1 merge collector) for optimized scavenging and a deep, aggressive tone.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny MGB GT widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** and **carbon fiber side skirts** (e.g., **Seibon Carbon**). Extend the rear wheel arches by 2 inches to accommodate **17x9 ET20 Enkei PF07 wheels** (gold finish) with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires** (245/40/17).

Replace the stock front bumper with a **custom aluminum splitter** (e.g., **AeroCatch quick-release mounts**) and a **carbon fiber hood** (e.g., **Fiberfab MGB GT V8 replica with functional NACA ducts**) to feed the supercharger. Add **OMP carbon fiber side mirrors** and a **custom rear diffuser** (e.g., **3D-printed ABS with integrated LED brake light**).

Interior upgrades include **Recaro SRD bucket seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara inserts**), a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and a **custom roll cage** (e.g., **Custom Cages 6-point bolt-in, T45 steel**). Replace the stock gauges with a **Motec C127 dash display** and add **Sparco harnesses (4-point, FIA-approved)** for track use.
